methodsAttempted.query: site:jwc.lzu.edu.cn "人工智能生成内容检测" "兰州大学"
methodsAttempted.notes: The targeted query confirmed the same Teaching Affairs Office notice as the only high-specificity official result found.

jwc.lzu.edu.cn is an official Lanzhou University Teaching Affairs Office subdomain under lzu.edu.cn. robots.txt checks for jwc.lzu.edu.cn and www.lzu.edu.cn returned 404-style pages rather than disallow rules.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery located one primary Lanzhou University Teaching Affairs Office page with thesis-management language about AI-generated content detection. Other official search results mentioning AI were teaching quality, newsletter, project-list, or commentary materials and were not used as policy evidence.

stopConditions: Stop after the official Teaching Affairs Office notice supports narrow undergraduate-thesis claims.
Do not infer a university-wide standalone generative-AI policy from this thesis-work notice.
Do not infer approved tools, privacy rules, staff rules, research rules, or graduate rules from the source.
Do not stage raw HTML, PDFs, screenshots, or full normalized text in Git.

artifacts.sourceTitle: 关于做好2025届本科生毕业论文（设计）工作的通知
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: 关于做好2025届本科生毕业论文（设计）工作的通知。各教学单位：为持续加强本科毕业论文（含毕业设计，下同）管理工作，确保毕业论文质量，严肃学术纪律，强化学术诚信，加强学风建设，现就2025届本科生毕业论文工作安排如下。
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The notice is about arrangements for 2025 undergraduate thesis and design work and frames them as thesis-quality, academic-discipline, and academic-integrity management.
artifacts.rightsNote: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.

artifacts.title: Lanzhou University staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence from an official Lanzhou University Teaching Affairs Office notice supports narrow undergraduate-thesis claims about AI-generated content detection, academic-integrity checks, and avoiding over-reliance on AI. No standalone university-wide generative-AI policy was found during this run.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
The staged claims are scoped to the 2025 undergraduate thesis work notice and do not establish a university-wide approved-tools, privacy, research, graduate, or staff AI policy.
artifacts.sourceRightsPolicy: Tracker metadata is open licensed. Official source documents, page text, PDFs, and other source materials retain their original rights and terms.
